Add CHANGELOG for v1.0.0 release

Document all features included in the initial release:
- ZSH with Zinit and Powerlevel10k
- Neovim with lazy.nvim and LSP
- Kitty terminal configuration
- Tmux with gpakosz base

Bash(gh release create v1.0.0 --title "v1.0.0 - Initial Release" --notes "$(cat <<''EOF''
## 🎉 Initial Release

My personal macOS development environment - meticulously crafted configuration for a productive and beautiful terminal experience.

### ✨ Highlights

- **ZSH** with Zinit plugin manager and Powerlevel10k instant prompt
- **Neovim** with lazy.nvim, LSP, Treesitter, and Telescope
- **Kitty** GPU-accelerated terminal with multiple themes
- **Tmux** based on gpakosz/.tmux with Dracula theme
- **ASDF** multi-language version manager
- **Modern CLI tools**: bat, lsd, fd, ripgrep, fzf

### 📦 What''s Included

| Component | Tool |
|-----------|------|
| Shell | ZSH + Zinit + Powerlevel10k |
| Editor | Neovim + lazy.nvim + LSP |
| Terminal | Kitty (GPU-accelerated) |
| Multiplexer | Tmux + gpakosz/.tmux |
| Version Manager | ASDF |
| Package Manager | Homebrew |

### 🚀 Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/javicosvml/.dotfiles.git ~/.dotfiles
cd ~/.dotfiles
make all
```

### 📚 Documentation

- [ZSH Configuration](doc/zsh.md)
- [Neovim Configuration](doc/nvim.md)
- [Tmux Configuration](doc/tmux.md)
- [Kitty Configuration](doc/kitty.md)

---

See [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) for full details.
EOF
)")
